name: d3-contour

en.when_to_use: Use it when a scalar field or heat grid needs isolines (marching squares), or when a 2D point cloud needs density contours, instead of calculating contour polygons by hand. Do not use it for a single-value bar chart or discrete heatmap cells. Augment boundary: it outputs GeoJSON MultiPolygon; render with d3-geo's geoPath (already in the catalog) or convert it manually to SVG/canvas.
en.why_valuable: Hand-calculated contour polygons are error-prone and produce broken topology. d3-contour uses marching squares for consistent contour topology plus 2D kernel density estimation, accepts a flat numeric grid or point array, and outputs standard GeoJSON.

data_in.note: For isolines, values is a flat row-major number[] of length width*height, where element i+j*width maps to plane point <i+0.5, j+0.5>. For density, supply points to contourDensity instead; points and values are mutually exclusive.

schema.values: number[] -- flat scalar grid of length width*height in row-major order (for contours)
schema.width: number -- number of grid columns n
schema.height: number -- number of grid rows m
schema.thresholds?: number | number[] -- number of thresholds or an explicit threshold array; automatic levels by default
schema.points?: [x,y][] -- point cloud used with contourDensity; mutually exclusive with values
schema.bandwidth?: number -- density-kernel bandwidth for contourDensity; about 20 by default

when_to_use: 有标量场/热力网格要等值线(marching squares),或有 2D 点云要密度等值带时用它,而非手算等高线多边形;单值柱状或离散热力块不用它。augment 边界:输出 GeoJSON MultiPolygon,渲染配 d3-geo 的 geoPath(目录已有)或手动转 SVG/canvas。
why_valuable: AI 手算等高线多边形必错、拓扑还会断裂;d3-contour 用 marching squares 固定等值线拓扑 + 2D 核密度估计,吃扁平数值网格或点数组,输出标准 GeoJSON。

data_in.note: 等值线路径:values 是长度 width*height 的扁平行主序 number[],元素 i+j*width ↔ 平面点 ⟨i+0.5, j+0.5⟩。密度路径:改喂 points 用 contourDensity,与 values 二选一。

schema.values: number[] —— 扁平标量网格,长度 = width*height,行主序(contours 用)
schema.thresholds?: number | number[] —— 阈值个数或显式阈值数组,默认自动分档
schema.points?: [x,y][] —— 点云(改用 contourDensity 时),与 values 二选一
schema.bandwidth?: number —— 密度核带宽(contourDensity),默认约 20

provides._note: headless-primitive:marching squares 等值线 + 2D 密度;输出 GeoJSON MultiPolygon,无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵,消费 AI 用 d3-geo geoPath 或手动画。
provides.outputs: contours(values) → GeoJSON MultiPolygon[](每个 geometry.value = 其阈值);contourDensity(points) → 密度等值带。坐标平面制,元素 i+j*width ↔ ⟨i+0.5, j+0.5⟩。

api_surface.render: GeoJSON 交给 d3-geo geoPath()(identity/null 投影)或手动转 SVG/canvas(本包不含渲染)

peer.note: d3-contour 只出 GeoJSON MultiPolygon;用 d3-geo(目录已有)的 geoPath()(null/identity 投影)转 SVG path 或画 canvas。

boot.note: contours(values) 与 contourDensity(points) 都返回 GeoJSON MultiPolygon[](每个 .value=阈值),用 d3-geo 的 geoPath()(identity 投影)转 SVG path 或画 canvas。库无 DOM/style/event/window 足迹。

isolation.evidence: +esm named exports contours, contourDensity(B/rn)已核。contours().size([n,m]).thresholds(数组或个数).smooth(bool) 然后 contours(values)——values 是长度 n*m 的扁平行主序 number[];返回 GeoJSON MultiPolygon[],每个 geometry.value = 其阈值(src/contours.js:34,186-201)。contourDensity().x(fn).y(fn).size([w,h]).cellSize(n).bandwidth(n).thresholds(...).weight(fn) 然后 contourDensity(points) → 密度 MultiPolygon[](src/density.js:18,56-75)。输出平面 GeoJSON:元素 i+j*n ↔ ⟨i+0.5, j+0.5⟩。渲染经 d3-geo 的 geoPath(identity/null 投影)或手动 SVG/canvas——本包不含。dep:d3-array@^3.2。零 DOM/style/event/window 足迹(纯几何计算)。headless-primitive。
